profiles.company_description: Bonecrashers Limited is a dynamic multiservice provider in Uganda dedicated to bridging the gap between top-tier technical talent and client needs. We operate across multiple sectors, providing professional solutions in web design, digital marketing, graphic branding, carpentry, electrical installations, and catering services. Our goal is to consistently deliver high-quality, reliable, and innovative services tailored to both corporate and residential clients across the country.

profiles.skills:
UI/UX Design, Wireframing, and Prototyping (Figma, Adobe XD)

Responsive Web Design & Mobile Optimization

Content Management Systems (WordPress, Webflow, Shopify)

Frontend Basics (HTML5, CSS3, basic JavaScript)

Search Engine Optimization (SEO) & Website Speed Optimization
profiles.education:
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology – Makerere University (Graduated 2023)

Certified Professional Web Designer – Online Course/Bootcamp (2024)
